messages.content:
The classrooms ___ after school every day.



are cleaned 

were cleaned

will be cleaned

have been cleaned

The telephone _ in  1876.

is invented

was invented

will be invented

has been invented

My locker ___ just __ .

is opened

was opened

will be opened

has been opened

The new school __ in a few months.

is finished

was finished

will be finished

has been finished

It's dark. I can't see _.

anything

nothing

nobody

When I finish my studies, I'm going to __United States for a year, 


the 

-
go to the United States for a year.

When I finish my studies, I'm going to __United States for a year, 


the 

-
There is no article needed in this sentence. It should be "When I finish my studies, I'm going to go to the United States for a year."

Brussels is the capital of ___Belgium. 

the

-
Belgium. No article is needed here.

Brussels is the capital of ___Belgium. 

the

-
There is no "the" needed in this sentence. It should be "Brussels is the capital of Belgium."
